subject: An armored humanoid figure mounted on a large dark beast, leading a massed army across a dusty plain
description: A figure clad in pale armor is mounted high on a massive dark creature — broad-shouldered, low-slung, and distinctly beast-like with a gaping maw visible beneath its bulk. The rider holds what appears to be a staff or reins aloft, posture commanding, facing outward as if addressing or leading troops. Behind and below stretches a crowd of armored figures extending toward the horizon, rendered in the dusty haze of a desert plain. The scale of the mount dwarfs the infantry behind. The composition signals leadership and command over a massed force.
foreground: mounted commander on a large dark beast, arm raised, facing outward
background: dusty plain filled with massed infantry in the haze
